name: @costrinity/vigil-compliance-mcp
description: VIGIL is a safety and compliance oversight layer for AI agents that produces verifiable compliance receipts: check risky actions before they run, get an allow/deny/hold decision, and keep an Ed25519-signed agent action receipt anyone can verify offline. Covers dangerous shell/SQL/secret-exfil actions plus consent, breach, DPIA, EU AI Act, India DPDP and 11 more regimes. Cooperative guardrail with heuristic detection, limits documented publicly. Zero setup: the first tool call self-provisions a trial key.
author: COSTRINITY (Indigenous-owned software studio, Regina, Saskatchewan, Treaty 4 territory)
